faqs.q: How long does an MVP take?
faqs.a: Typical startup MVPs are delivered in about 6–10 weeks depending on scope.
Yes. We provide dedicated teams, maintenance, optimization, and continuous development.

faqs.a: Use the contact form on infigosolutions.com or the enterprise / startup CTAs on the site.
